description_long: This is a large, industrial-style pipe wrench with a robust, elongated handle and a heavy-duty adjustable jaw. The body is predominantly yellow, with visible signs of wear and grime, suggesting frequent use in tough environments. The handle features a textured, dark grip area, likely for improved handling and slip resistance. The jaw mechanism is metallic and includes a knurled adjustment wheel for altering the jaw width, with the upper jaw showing serrated teeth for gripping pipes or fittings. The wrench's construction appears to be primarily metal, with some rubber or composite material on the handle for comfort. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a rugged finish and no visible branding.
description: A large, yellow industrial pipe wrench with a textured dark handle grip and an adjustable, serrated metal jaw. The tool shows signs of wear and is built for heavy-duty use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yellow wrench, the dark grip area, and the adjustable jaw mechanism.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the jaw, the adjustment wheel, and the thickness of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wrench's length, grip, and jaw from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle and the back of the jaw assembly.
attribute_handle_grip_pattern: The handle grip area has a textured, possibly rubberized pattern for improved grip, appearing as a dark, roughened section.
attribute_rust_or_wear_marks: Visible wear marks and grime are present, especially on the handle and jaw, but no significant rust or corrosion is visible.
